offer: For construction contractors processing 5–15 projects/month, delays in obtaining regulatory permits cause project delays. We automate permit submissions instead of manual submission of permit documents.
problem: Delays in obtaining regulatory permits for construction projects.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to construction contractors with demo video
Participate in community forums for construction tools
try_it: Let users try status tracking for permits and manual invoice entry
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
